topic: Google free AI medical exam practice tests for India + Iran AWS attacks + postcard idea
question_to_deb: When you think about all the technology you use, which bit would you miss most if it suddenly stopped working? Not the most impressive bit. The one you would actually feel the absence of.
notes: Google NEET practice tests as human-interest lead. Iran-AWS attacks as contrast. Postcard joke. Deep Q about most-missed technology. TTS-optimized.
